name: LiverRaAuditFailureCategory
title: LiverRa AuditEvent — Failure Category
description: Structured failure taxonomy attached to a failed AuditEvent. Lets dashboards group failures by root cause without parsing free-text outcome descriptions (FR-029b, 002-acr-structured-readout).

element.short: Why the audited action failed (set when AuditEvent.outcome != 0)

binding.description: Permitted values: network | validation | auth | audit_chain_unavailable | stale_etag | clipboard_blocked | tenant_violation | other
